_comment: Fill in one or more test cases. Remove _comment fields before importing. Starting materials and products accept SMILES, InChI, common names, or MOL blocks -- they are auto-converted to canonical SMILES on import.
name: Human readable reaction name
description: Brief description of the reaction and its significance.
notes: Optional notes about conditions or literature source.

run_config._comment: Optional model selection overrides. All fields are optional. Remove this block to use eval-set-level defaults.

verified_mechanism._comment: Optional. Provide known mechanistic steps for verified-mode comparison. Remove this entire block for unverified testing.
